text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions are flaring with Trump's comments on Iran and Spain, pushing oil up and creating broad market uncertainty. This environment tends to make growth-oriented tech and chip names nervous.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 35.06% and flagged SELL. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also down 23.1%. QQQI is flagged TRIM at -2.16%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on geopolitical developments and any further trade rhetoric. Also, monitor the competitive landscape in the chip sector and AI regulatory news.

Bottom line: Focus on aggressive risk management for your leveraged positions given the current market volatility.
plays: Strongly consider exiting SOXL at 165.28 to stop further decay and loss; leveraged ETFs are punishing in drawdowns.
Review SPAL, a new leveraged position down 23.1%; consider trimming or exiting given its volatility and decay.
Trim QQQI at 55.19, respecting its 52 stop, as flagged by your scanner.
